narrative:
Olmsted Falls City has 6,596 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.3%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.2 percentage points.
